member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

member_group_type.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (member_group_no) order by tab.membership_no ,tab.seq_no , tab.member_group_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id, (CASE lag(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no ) WHEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no, trim(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no) as member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_period, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, (CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_installment END) as emer_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_period,
(CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_installment END) as norm_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_period, (CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_installment END) as spec_installment ,
sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.fund_amount FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr > 0 )
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '30/04/2023' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type = '001' /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/ )tab

r_ktm_rep_mem_share_loan_year_nest_a.sql:
select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status = '0' THEN emer_balance ELSE 0 END) AS bal_0 , SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status = '1' THEN emer_balance ELSE 0 END) AS bal_1
from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_loan_card where trim(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) = trim(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = {1} group by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code

r_ktm_rep_mem_share_loan_year_nest_a_2.sql:
select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status = '0' THEN emer_balance ELSE 0 END) AS bal_0 , SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status = '1' THEN emer_balance ELSE 0 END) AS bal_1
from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_loan_card where trim(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) = trim(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = {1} group by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code

r_ktm_rep_mem_share_loan_year_nest_a_3.sql:
select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status = '0' THEN emer_balance ELSE 0 END) AS bal_0 , SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status = '1' THEN emer_balance ELSE 0 END) AS bal_1
from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_loan_card where trim(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) = trim(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = {1} group by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code
